name: Market Signals — Normalize
purpose: Accept a raw market signal, extract structured fields via LLM, validate output shape, and store the normalized signal.

trigger.description: Triggered when a new raw market signal is captured (manual entry or external source).

steps.name: validate_raw_input
steps.description: Validate required fields and trim input.

steps.name: extract_structured_fields
steps.description: Extract audience, problem, workaround, evidence_strength, frequency, urgency, confidence from raw text.

steps.name: validate_output_shape
steps.description: Validate normalized output against market-signal.normalized.v1 contract.

notes: Template only. No live n8n nodes. Import pending after MVP core is complete.
